_publications._publicationTitle: The haploinsufficient hematopoietic microenvironment is critical to the pathological fracture repair in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Col2.3Cre mice exhibited an ∼23% reduction in bone volume fraction (BV/TV) as compared to the WT and Col2.3Cre mice
details: Exhibited 23% reduction in bone volume fraction (BV/TV) compared to WT mice
